name: Wootric (InMoment) CX Feedback API
what_it_does: Wootric (now InMoment) REST API for in-app customer experience feedback platform. Enables AI agents to trigger NPS/CSAT/CES surveys, retrieve response data, access sentiment and trending analysis, and integrate customer feedback signals into CX and product workflows. Wootric specializes in real-time in-product feedback collection.
use_cases: Querying NPS/CSAT/CES scores and trends from customer success analytics agents
Retrieving individual survey responses and verbatim feedback from CX agents
Triggering targeted surveys based on product events from product analytics agents
Integrating Wootric feedback signals into CRM and retention workflow agents
not_for: Complex multi-question research surveys (use Qualtrics/Medallia for that)
Non-SaaS products without in-product feedback touchpoints
best_when: A SaaS product team using Wootric wants AI agents to surface real-time customer satisfaction signals, analyze feedback trends, and integrate NPS/CSAT data into product and CS workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Survey response data is personal data. Wootric is now part of InMoment — verify API documentation currency. GDPR compliance required for EU respondents.

auth.notes: Wootric OAuth 2.0. Client credentials for server-side integration. Access tokens required for all API calls.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: basic NPS with limited responses
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for advanced analytics and higher volume
pricing.notes: Wootric is now InMoment. Pricing may have changed. Verify current plans with InMoment.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: NPS/CSAT response data is personal data — GDPR compliance required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Wootric acquired by InMoment — verify API documentation is current
Corporate acquisition may affect future API development and support
Rate limits apply — throttle for bulk response retrieval
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer survey responses including NPS verbatim. SOC2, GDPR. Corporate acquisition by InMoment — verify service continuity. OAuth2 auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer NPS/CSAT feedback data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth2. InMoment acquisition risk factor.
